questionHtml: Sea otters are considered keystone species in this environment. Suggest how the presence of sea otters could affect the algae population.
markschemeHtml:
a. sea otters (feeding on sea urchins) limit sea urchin population;

b. the largest sea urchins are eaten;

c. shown by low biomass/small size (of sea urchins);

d. fewer/smaller sea urchins allow for increase in algae population;

e. sea otters have a top down effect;

Allow converse reasoning.

meta.title: Sea otters are considered keystone species in this environment. Suggest how the presence of sea otters could affect the algae population.
